generated_videos.prompt: Animated children's cartoon scene: Three cute anthropomorphic animals — a brown bear with round glasses and a blue overalls, a red fox with freckles and a yellow scarf, and a white rabbit with pink ears and a green dress — stand together in a vibrant pumpkin patch under bright daylight. The background features rolling green hills, colorful vegetable crops (pumpkins, carrots, corn), and rustic wooden cottages with flower boxes. Warm golden-hour lighting casts soft shadows; saturated, cheerful color palette with high contrast and clean line art. Camera starts in medium full shot, slowly pushing in to medium close-up as the bear’s expression shifts from curious to alarmed. Subtle parallax layering adds depth. Animated text subtitle appears centered: '豌豆藤蔓不知为什么变大了' — clear, bold, rounded Chinese font (Noto Sans SC), white with black stroke, perfectly legible. Smooth motion, 24fps, ultra-sharp 4K resolution, no photorealism — consistent flat-shaded 2D cartoon style with gentle squash-and-stretch animation.

Animated children's cartoon scene: Three cute anthropomorphic animals — a brown bear, a red fox, and a white rabbit — stand atop a giant, vibrant green pea vine that coils dynamically through a sunlit outdoor garden. The sheep character (newly introduced) stands center-frame, eyes tightly closed, mouth wide open in exaggerated surprise, shouting 'My goodness!' before snapping mouth shut with a comical blink. Background features colorful cottage roofs, blooming flowers, soft-focus trees, and clear blue sky with gentle clouds. Warm, saturated color palette with high-contrast lighting, smooth cel-shaded rendering, soft shadows, and clean line art. Medium full shot, slight low-angle camera to emphasize vine scale; subtle dolly-in during the sheep's exclamation. Crisp 4K resolution, 24fps, smooth motion interpolation. Overlay clear, centered, bold sans-serif Chinese subtitles with soft white stroke and light yellow fill, displaying: '我的天呐' (at 4.5s) and '（闭嘴）' (at 6.0s), timed precisely to lip movements.

Animated cartoon scene: A cheerful, round-faced anthropomorphic rabbit with soft white fur, pink inner ears, and a light blue bow on its head stands in a vibrant outdoor garden. The rabbit closes its eyes and smiles warmly, then opens them wide with joyful surprise while saying '我觉得太有趣了' (in clear, synchronized Chinese subtitles). It gently hops once, arms raised in delight. Background features lush green pea vines climbing wooden trellises, blooming daisies, a few apple trees with glossy red fruits, and distant pastel-colored cottages with sloped roofs under a bright cyan sky with soft cumulus clouds. Warm, even daylight illumination creates gentle shadows and enhances saturated, harmonious colors—mint greens, buttery yellows, sky blues. Smooth 2D hand-drawn animation style with subtle texture overlay for depth; clean linework, soft gradients, no photorealism. Medium full-shot camera, slight upward tilt to emphasize the rabbit's expressive face and garden scale; slow push-in over 4 seconds. High-resolution 16:9 frame at 24fps, crisp anti-aliased Chinese subtitles centered at bottom third—Noto Sans SC font, 32pt, white with subtle black stroke, perfectly synced to audio.

Animated scene in cheerful children's cartoon style: Two anthropomorphic bear characters stand side-by-side in a vibrant outdoor garden. Left bear wears a bright red beanie and blue overalls, gesturing animatedly with both paws toward a massive, coiling green pea vine dominating the frame; right bear wears green suspenders over a yellow shirt, scratching its head thoughtfully with one paw while frowning slightly in mock concern. Background features a cheerful orange-roofed wooden house, leafy oak tree with dappled sunlight, and lush grass with scattered garden tools. Warm golden-hour lighting, saturated pastel palette (mint greens, coral accents, sky-blue sky), soft cel-shaded textures, smooth 2D animation at 24fps. Medium two-shot camera angle, slight gentle push-in to emphasize their expressive faces and dynamic body language. Clear, centered, bold sans-serif Chinese subtitles appear at bottom third—legible, high-contrast white text with subtle black stroke—displaying: '我觉得太有趣了,为了安全,必须扳倒慢腾。' High-resolution 16:9 output, no photorealism, consistent with prior slices’ stylized proportions and squash-and-stretch animation principles.

Animated scene in cheerful children's cartoon style: A cute anthropomorphic rabbit with soft white fur, wearing a bright blue satin bow on her head, turns gracefully away from the camera and walks confidently toward a cheerful orange house in the distance. Behind her, a small brown bear wearing a red beanie enters frame from the right, waving cheerfully with both paws. Background features a vibrant garden with lush green trees, daisies, and gentle sunlight casting soft shadows. Warm, saturated color palette with high-contrast lighting and smooth cel-shaded rendering. Medium-long shot with slow dolly-back camera movement to emphasize depth and character separation; slight parallax effect on background layers. Crisp 4K resolution, 24fps, clean line art with subtle texture overlay for tactile charm. Overlay clear, centered Chinese subtitles in rounded sans-serif font (size 48, white with soft black stroke), displaying: '小兔子转身离开,小熊跟了上来' — perfectly synchronized with audio timing and legible throughout.
